titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 191A: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 191A. (A.R. No. 128 of 1914.) TIRUVEṞUMBŪR, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Pipīlikēśvara temple.

This records that the ūrār of Tiruveṟumbiyūr in Kavira-nāḍu endowed three plots of land in full, Gaṇavati-vayakkal, Kayilāya-vayakkal, and Araiśi-vayakkal, freed from taxes to provide for the requirements of food and other offerings during the midnight service to the god Tirumalai-āḻvār of the above village.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 395.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 6 Āvatu kaviranāṭṭu tiruveṟumpiyū
ru Ūrom Eṅkaḷ tiruveṟumpiyūrt ti
rumalaiyāḷvārkku Arddhayāmam Amutu
ceyya vaitta poṉakappaḻavarici nāḻi po
rik kaṟiyamutu 1 neyyamutu Oru piṭiyum
tayiramutu nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu Āṟum Ilaiyamutu Oraṭukkum Āka Ippaṭi ca
ntirātittavaṟ ceyyavaitta ṉilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur miyūrk kayilāya vayakkalukku
m kaṇavati vayakkalukkum Icaitta kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nokkippoṉa vāykkā
lukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai talaivāy ṉilattukku vaṭakkum talaivāy ṉilattu
kku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kāṉāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kucava ṉilattu
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṇṭuruṭaiyā ṉakkaṉ cātta nilattukkum mañcaṉ
(caṉ) cantira ṉi
ṉilattukku
teṟkkum Araici vayakkalukku kiḻpāṟkellai vāykkalu
kku meṟkkum vāykkālukku vaṭakkum cantiraṉ piṭāra ṉilattu
kkum kiḻakkum kollai ṉilattukku teṟkkum Āka Iraṇṭu ki
nilam Iṟaiyili cantrātittavaṟ Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi tiruveṟumpiyūr malaiy
tevarkku kuṭuttom tiruveṟumpiyūrrom pannamāheśvaraRead panmāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 191A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
